results.name: Latest KNT/LABUBU pair is usable
results.expected: pair has KNT/LABUBU reserves and LP supply

results.name: 50 USDT deposits create LP value and power
results.expected: ABCDE round-robin deposits are all processed

results.name: Node qualification from 50 deposits
results.expected: A self LP >=1000U, direct LP >=3000U, effective directs = 4

results.name: Aggregate deposit totals
results.expected: total LP +5000U and total power at least +30000

results.name: Keeper maintenance calls
results.expected: price, global LP, pool update, and reward distribution calls do not revert

results.name: Burn queue payout
results.expected: B burns 10 KNT and queue pays 12 KNT

results.name: Automatic AMM sell tax
results.expected: 100 KNT sell sends 85 KNT to pair and distributes taxes

results.name: Migration same-day release guard
results.expected: new migration positions are not claimable on the same day

results.name: Partial LP withdrawal
results.expected: E withdraws 100U LP value and receives LABUBU

results.name: Static/dynamic reward accrual after elapsed day
results.expected: requires BSC Testnet currentDay to advance by at least one day

actual.note: Run npm run test:local for the time-travel coverage of static reward, dynamic reward, node reward, and migration release payout.
